caption: In the video, a person is seen crafting a birthday card on a grid-lined cutting mat. The card features a camouflage pattern with a white tag that reads, "Hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things." The person's hands, adorned with rings and neatly manicured nails, are carefully adjusting a piece of brown ribbon or twine tied around the card. The left hand holds the card steady while the right hand makes precise adjustments to the ribbon, ensuring it is properly positioned and secure. The workspace includes various crafting materials, such as additional patterned paper and tools, indicating a detailed and thoughtful card-making process. The person appears focused and meticulous in their work, demonstrating care and attention to detail in creating a personalized birthday greeting.
